description: Product Description Long lasting protection - Fluorodine oxygen white toothpaste contains an advanced oxygenated whitening system to help remove stains and restore the natural whiteness of your teeth. Regular use of Fluorodine oxygen white toothpaste can help protect you against cavities and gum disease. Fluorodine oxygen white toothpaste actively helps strengthen enamel, fights cavities, reduces decay and gives a cleaner, fresher, whiter look to your teeth. Ingredients FALSE Directions Apply a pea-sized amount to toothbrush, brush in circular motions for 2 minutes, rinse with water. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only.
